scope: wave2 fan-out migration: the 2 legacy-parity read streams only (sitemaps, jobs); Web Scraper Cloud's write endpoints (sitemap create/update, job create/delete) are out of scope for this migration (legacy itself ships no writes; capabilities.write is false).
